description_long: This is a weathered stone bust sculpture mounted on a rectangular pedestal. The bust depicts a male figure with curly hair, a prominent brow, and draped clothing, rendered in a classical style. The surface is mottled with patches of discoloration and erosion, suggesting significant age and exposure to the elements. The pedestal consists of several stacked, rectangular stone blocks, each with visible wear and rough texture. The back of the bust shows detailed folds in the drapery, while the sides reveal the depth and three-dimensionality of the carving. The overall appearance is that of a traditional monument or commemorative statue, likely intended for outdoor display.
description: A weathered stone bust of a male figure with curly hair and draped clothing, mounted on a rectangular pedestal. The sculpture shows significant age and classical detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, curly hair, and draped clothing of the bust atop a rectangular pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the depth of the bust, and the layered structure of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and the flowing drapery, as well as the worn surface of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face and the contours of the bust and pedestal.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears suitable for outdoor urban or park environments.
